seen.name: hour_of_day_uniform
seen.description: UTC hour-of-day shows no systematic bias in transfer timing
seen.hypothesis: Transfers are uniformly distributed across 24 hours of UTC day
seen.notes: Extract hour = (block_timestamp % 86400) / 3600. Count transfers in each hour 0-23. Null: uniform distribution (expected frequency = total / 24 per bin).

seen.name: weekday_am_pm_independence
seen.description: AM/PM timing and weekday/weekend are independent transfer drivers
seen.hypothesis: AM/PM timing and weekday/weekend occurrence are statistically independent
seen.notes: 2×2 contingency: (AM vs PM) × (weekday Mon-Fri vs weekend Sat-Sun). Extract hour and day-of-week from block_timestamp. Return counts [AM-weekday, AM-weekend, PM-weekday, PM-weekend].

seen.name: seconds_within_minute
seen.description: Seconds component shows no systematic bias within each minute
seen.hypothesis: Transfer timestamp seconds component is uniformly distributed across 0-59
seen.notes: Extract second = block_timestamp % 60. Frequency array of 60 bins for KS test against uniform[0,60). Detects sub-second precision artifacts or miner timing patterns.

seen.name: day_of_week_chi2
seen.description: ERC-20 transfers are uniformly distributed across days of the week
seen.hypothesis: Null hypothesis: block_timestamp shows no systematic bias by day of week (uniform across Monday–Sunday)
seen.notes: Extract day of week (0=Monday, 6=Sunday) from Unix timestamp; compute 7-category histogram; df = 6

seen.name: month_of_year_chi2
seen.description: ERC-20 transfers show no seasonal pattern across calendar months
seen.hypothesis: Null hypothesis: block_timestamp is uniformly distributed across the 12 calendar months
seen.notes: Extract calendar month (1–12) from Unix timestamp; compute 12-category histogram; df = 11

seen.name: timestamp_parity_magnitude
seen.description: Low-order timestamp bit is independent of transaction magnitude era
seen.hypothesis: Null hypothesis: the last bit of block_timestamp (even vs odd) is independent of whether timestamp is in lower or upper half of corpus range
seen.notes: 2×2 contingency: {even/odd last bit} × {below/above median timestamp}; format counts as [even_low, even_high, odd_low, odd_high]

significant.name: hour_of_day_uniform
significant.description: UTC hour-of-day shows no systematic bias in transfer timing

significant.name: day_of_week_chi2
significant.description: ERC-20 transfers are uniformly distributed across days of the week
